description: Leading private healthcare provider in Central & Eastern Europe offering occupational health services, preventive care, and comprehensive medical services to employers and individuals. Operates across Poland, Romania, and other CEE markets.
business_model: B2B2C - Subscription-based healthcare services to employers
target_market: CEE employers (Poland, Romania, etc.) seeking private healthcare for employees
competitive_advantage: Market leader in CEE, comprehensive service offering, strong brand, physical + digital

varden_fit.rationale: Major competitor in CEE - established player with strong employer relationships
